parameters.subject: Appointment confirmed - Greenfield Medical
parameters.message: =Hi {{ $json.patient_name }} ,Your appointment is confirmed for {{ $json['Appointment Date'] }} starting at {{ $json['start Time'] }} ending at {{ $json['end Time'] }} your appointment id is {{ $json.id }}.See you then! Greenfield Medical

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "success": true, "message": "Appointment booked for " + $('Set Visit Duration').item.json.patient_name  + " on " +$('Log Appointment').item.json['Appointment Date'] + "at" + $('Log Appointment').item.json['start Time']  } }}
={{ { "success": false, "message": "That time is no longer available" } }}

parameters.subject: Appointment cancelled - Greenfield Medical
parameters.message: =Hi {{ $('Find Appointment (Cancel)').item.json.patient_name }},Your appointment on {{ $('Find Appointment (Cancel)').item.json['Appointment Date'] }} has been cancelled. Call us if you'd like to rebook.Greenfield Medical

parameters.subject: Appointment rescheduled - Greenfield Medical
parameters.message: =Hi {{ $('Set New Duration').item.json.patient_name }},Your appointment has been moved from {{ $('Appointment Found? (Reschedule)').item.json['start Time'] }} to {{ $json['start Time'] }} as per your request .Greenfield Medical

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "success": false, "message": "That new time is not available" } }}

parameters.subject: Appointment cancelled - Greenfield Medical
parameters.message: =Hi {{ $('Find Appointment (Cancel)1').item.json.patient_name }},Your all appointments have been cancelled. Call us if you'd like to rebook.Greenfield Medical
